WHEN PLACED INTO REVERSE THE BACKUP CAMERA AUTOMATICALLY TURNS ON AT MAXIMUM BRIGHTNESS AND CANNOT BE DIMMED OR OVER RIDDEN. THIS CAUSES BLINDING AND INABILITY TO SEE OUT OF THE VEHICLE AT NIGHT. THE BRIGHTNESS IS SUCH THAT YOU CANNOT SEE OUT OF ANY WINDOWS FROM INSIDE THE VEHICL

narrative.headline: What 2017 Chevrolet Tahoe owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 168 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Power Train (30% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
